hero_layout: text overlaid on a full-background pattern or illustration
hero_headline_scale: mixed — huge first name, smaller subtitle underneath
hero_height: auto — natural content height, no forced height
nav_style: inline in hero — no separate nav bar, links inside hero
card_style: hover-to-reveal — minimal at rest, details on hover
spacing_density: ultra-spacious — luxury feel, huge gaps between sections
quirk: project cards flip on hover to reveal description on the back
